title: Rokyn'
description: This is a tech modpack inspired by GTA-style gameplay. Drive powerful cars and create a modern world full of technology and gadgets.
body:
Rokyn' is a modpack that brings a modern atmosphere to Minecraft. It includes various vehicles, weapons, and decorative mods that make city life possible. The pack really shines when used with a city map — that’s when the world starts to feel alive. You can drive around, decorate apartments, cook, or even set up your own small roleplay server with friends.

It also features Plasmo Voice for in-game voice chat, an economy system with different currencies, and popular mods like Farmer’s Delight, Security Craft, and several Macaw’s furniture packs. In the future, I plan to add a custom currency mod to make trading more convenient.

Whether you want to explore, build, or just hang out with friends in a modern Minecraft world, this modpack gives you plenty of ways to have fun.

PS - I couldn't add my own mod because of an mcreator bug.

# **Join the Discord server for feedback and questions.**
